upgrades.name: Spike Trap
upgrades.effect: Hidden spikes stab an intruder

upgrades.name: Poison Dart
upgrades.effect: Coats an intruder in lingering venom

upgrades.name: Boulder Trap
upgrades.effect: Drops a boulder on an intruder

upgrades.name: Flame Vent
upgrades.effect: Sets an intruder ablaze with burning oil

upgrades.name: Frost Snare
upgrades.effect: Holds the party fast and leaves them exposed — set it before a killbox

upgrades.name: Alarm Gong
upgrades.effect: Alerts every defender the party will face

upgrades.name: Mana Siphon
upgrades.effect: Drinks the ambient magic intruders carry

upgrades.name: Gold Snatcher
upgrades.effect: Picks the party pouch back into your vault

upgrades.name: Abyssal Maw
upgrades.effect: A hungering void bites down on an intruder

upgrades.name: Gold Cache
upgrades.effect: Increases gold dropped when adventurers defeat monsters

upgrades.name: Treasure Vault
upgrades.effect: Significantly increases gold drops

upgrades.name: Dragon Hoard
upgrades.effect: Massively increases gold drops

upgrades.name: Stone Walls
upgrades.effect: Increases monster defense in this room

upgrades.name: Dark Aura
upgrades.effect: Boosts all monster stats in this room

upgrades.name: Demonic Pact
upgrades.effect: Greatly enhances monster power

upgrades.name: Growth Chamber
upgrades.effect: Monsters in this room gain experience faster

upgrades.name: Evolution Pit
upgrades.effect: Allows monsters to evolve to higher tiers

upgrades.name: Fire Shrine
upgrades.effect: Fire monsters in this room fight 30% harder

upgrades.name: Spring Altar
upgrades.effect: Water monsters in this room fight 30% harder

upgrades.name: Standing Stones
upgrades.effect: Earth monsters in this room fight 30% harder

upgrades.name: Ossuary
upgrades.effect: Death monsters in this room fight 30% harder
